The '''Domed City of Aquarius''' was the underwater center of civilization on [[Dac/Legends|Dac]].

==History==
Although many other [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] cities existed above the oceans, Aquarius was the only one completely underwater. Encased in a [[Domed city/Legends|large bubble]], it was designed to allow water and air breathing species to live together, including [[Whaladon/Legends|Whaladons]].

{{City-stub}}
